payload.answer: Extracted durable takeaways: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Sam is open to catching up about AI infra and asked Daniele to send an article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, but lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is interested in catching up about AI infra and wants Daniele to send an article about it.

details: Committed supported employment update without retaining Goldman as current employer.
Committed AI infra catch-up interest with medium confidence due to contextual reference to 'that article'.
